name: Mountain of Smiling Bodies
description:
The walls were covered in blood.
https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/69649290

I mean, it's a pile of rotting flesh, but now it's just a human with rotting flesh, I digress, we move on.

Lore reason on how she got her human body, there was a anomaly who had breached it's contaminant while freeing some others, all of them was defeated at once with the use of a E.G.O, but the reaction somehow manage to give the Abnormality human bodies.

And to be clear, I only just downloaded Lobotomy corp and I have yet to play it, and as of right now Garlic is sleeping so I can't bother to double check if it's accurate, but I'm going to watch a quick video on it to see the gameplay and try to get the intro to match. This is more meant of a RPG bot.

EN: So we decided for 2 intros for this, the other intro will be made at a later date however, in this you're more like this instead of how Lob corp gameplay works
Short intro AND I RELALY MEAN SHORT because there's like, no reason to make it long... the other intro will be more though.
